title: The Word Garden
storySnippet: Lira wanders into an enchanted garden where words bloom like flowers, each with its own meaning.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Building a bridge out of paper clips seemed unlikely, but the plan was actually ___.
data.definition: Feasible: possible and practical to accomplish; capable of being done.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Leo is so ___ that he makes friends wherever he goes and loves group activities.
data.definition: Gregarious: fond of company; sociable and enjoying being with other people.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The science class discussed a ___ situation in which gravity suddenly disappeared.
data.definition: Hypothetical: based on an imagined situation rather than something real; theoretical.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The ___ rain kept the soccer team indoors for the entire week of practice.
data.definition: Incessant: continuing without pause or interruption; constant and unending.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The crowd was ___ when the home team scored the winning goal in the final seconds.
data.definition: Jubilant: feeling or expressing great happiness and triumph.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The ___ artist spent hours perfecting every tiny detail of her painting.
data.definition: Meticulous: showing great attention to detail; very careful and precise.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: As a ___ at chess, Sam was still learning the basic moves and strategies.
data.definition: Novice: a person who is new to and lacks experience in a skill or activity; a beginner.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The dark, ___ clouds rolling over the mountains warned the hikers to turn back.
data.definition: Ominous: giving the impression that something bad is going to happen; threatening.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The lake water was so ___ that you could see fish swimming near the bottom.
data.definition: Pristine: in its original, clean, and unspoiled condition.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: After losing the championship, the ___ team came back stronger the following year.
data.definition: Resilient: able to recover quickly from difficulties or setbacks; tough and adaptable.
